titleStmt.title: SII 40.216: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 216. (A.R. No. B. 261 of 1933.) Bhṛigubaṇḍa, Sattenapalle Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a stone set up to the south of the Chennakēśavasvāmi temple.
This is dated Śaka 1184, Duṁdubhi, Uttarāyaṇa Saṅkrānti, Tuesday.
Records the gift of lands for burning perpetual lamps in the temple of Kēśavadēva by a certain • • • • • Rāju. Further it records the gift of land at Rāvipāḍu by Aṅgareka Nāgi-Nāyaka.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī sakavaruṣaṁbulu 1184
ḍaṁgu duṁdubhi saṁvatsaramuna yuttarā
yana saṁkrāṁti puṇya maṁgala
vāramuna paṁḍamu rāju śrī
kēśavadēvaraku tāmaraceṟuvuvenaka Amudu
paḍiki 2 reṁḍu ma¨rttulu gāruṁcellani
citimi dīpamunakugānu vīni Āca
ṁdrākkamugāniccitimi ḍu Anumadāsi
dīpamunaku yeṁṭamavuṭi 1 lu truṟumavāṁḍu Aradīpamu
kesavadāsi Aradīpamu Anuppibōyuṁḍu Aradīpamu
narabeṁgaradīpa paṇisēsi peṭṭina dīpālu 2 reṁḍu vīni na
ḍapinavāriki Asvamēdha yāgaphalamu vīni naḍapanivariki
gaṁgakaṟuta kavilaṁboḍicinavāru
Aṁgarekanāgināyaḍu rāvipāḍi ceṟuva venaka A¨rdda
svadatāṁ dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ paradattā
pahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavētu . svadattaṁ paradatta
ṁvāyō harēti vasuṁdharā śaṣṭivvaruṣa sa
hasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ
Digital edition of SII 40.216 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
